title: CrossCuttingTheme
description: Represents a thematic through-line that spans multiple experiences, achievements, and bullets.

theme_name.description: Human-readable name of the theme (e.g., 'Leadership & Influence').

description.description: Short explanation of the theme and its relevance across roles.

experience_links.description: List of experience IDs that contribute to this theme.

achievement_links.description: List of achievement IDs that reinforce this theme.

bullet_links.description: List of bullet IDs that support this theme.

narrative_elements.description: Optional narrative elements tied to this theme.

keywords.description: Keywords associated with this theme for ATS and matching.

relevance_weight.description: Weight used by the tailoring engine to prioritize this theme.
